data.title: sprint-list-epics.sh --max-children=0 returns epics that have children
data.description: Running sprint-list-epics.sh --max-children=0 returned epic 0d66-ceb6 (Unified Primary Ticket Model for Sprint Skill) which has 10 children. The script should only return epics with zero child tickets. Verified via: .claude/scripts/dso ticket deps 0d66-ceb6 shows children array with 10 entries. This causes brainstorm to present epics that already have decomposition as candidates for brainstorming.
